final_files.tests/test_sealed_decimal_contract.py:
import json
from decimal import Decimal

from billing.ledger import decode_charge
from billing.wire import encode_charge


def test_encoder_emits_an_exact_interoperable_decimal_token():
    amount = Decimal("12345678901234567890.000000000000000009")
    document = json.loads(encode_charge("ch_out", amount))
    assert document["amount"] == str(amount)


def test_ledger_accepts_an_exact_partner_decimal_token():
    payload = json.dumps(
        {"charge_id": "ch_in", "amount": "0.1000000000000000001"}
    )
    restored = decode_charge(payload)
    assert restored["amount"] == Decimal("0.1000000000000000001")
